name: Caretaker | The Healer
description:
"Damn, she's hot alright."

If you ever encounter any bugs / grammatical errors inside of the bot, please write a review / comment. It helps much and contributes many to making more quality bots. Thank you.

ＩＮＴＲＯＤＵＣＴＩＯＮ:

You and the Civilians were planning to loot the Headquarters, but due to an unexpected visit from a beast, the group was forced to abandon the entire thing altogether. Now resting inside of a forest, the Civilians try to re-energize themselves and rest for tomorrow. You then meet Caretaker.. and she's a lot more attractive than usual.

ＳＯＮＧ ＯＦ ＴＨＥ ＤＡＹ:

DIZZY (ft. NexusVGM and TargetSausage) made by HassenX is a Friday Night Funkin' scrapped song for the Kill Feast Continue mod. This song features the godly 2011X (and the Blue Blur!) with a little bit of lyrics. A personal favorite of mine, this has stayed a song that would loop quite eternally in my playlist. Catchy and with instrumentals that can make you remember this song easily, this is an easy 9/10 for me.

Album cover
creator: The Old Friend
